arts.ttl: Liverpool goalkeeper in bizarre red card incident as midfielder makes new statement

Fernandez has been compared to the Argentine international Angel Di Maria because of the stylistic similarities between the two players. arts.ttl: Liverpool eye new club record ahead of Wolves clash
arts.sum: Liverpool could break a defensive club record with a clean sheet in Saturday's trip to Wolverhampton Wanderers. Liverpool have conceded just once so far in domestic action - Callum Hudson-Odoi's strike in the 1-0 defeat to Nottingham Forest - and could break the club record for fewest goals conceded across the opening six games of a season with a shut-out against Wolves.

arts.ttl: Liverpool stars drop team news hint vs Wolves amid Arne Slot's Cody Gakpo and Luis Diaz dilemma
arts.sum: Arne Slot has a wealth of options at his disposal when selecting his Liverpool starting XI, as the Reds prepare to take on Wolves at Molineux.

arts.ttl: Alisson confirms newest member of Liverpool leadership group under Arne Slot
arts.sum: Liverpool goalkeeper Alisson has revealed that a sixth member has been added to the club's leadership group, with Alexis Mac Allister taking on extra responsibility

arts.ttl: Michael Owen has theory on how Liverpool managed to capture Federico Chiesa in cut-price deal
arts.sum: Federico Chiesa completed a move to Liverpool from Juventus before transfer deadline day and Michael Owen has backed the Italian to be a success at Anfield.
